verses.text: Upna nei i cih ciangin i muhtheih nailoh i lamette ngah takpi ding, ci-in muan'na lungsim neihna ahi hi
Tanglai mite in upna a na neih manun Pasian in a na pakta hi
Pasian' kampauna tawh leitung leh vantung piang a, tu-a i muhtheih nate a om nailopi panin hong piang hi, ci-in i upna bek mah tawh a thei ihi hi

A upna hang mah tawh Abel in Kain' piakna sangin a san'theih huaizaw biakpiakna Pasian' tungah a na pia hi. Pasian in ama biakna na sang ahih manin a upna hangin mihoih hi, ci-in Pasian' pahtakna a na ngah hi. Abel a sihzawh a sawtpi hikhin napi-in tudong mahin upna thu a hong gengen lai a suak hi

A upna hang mahin Enok zong sihna tawh kipelh hi. Pasian in ama kiangah lato ahih manin kuamah in Enok mu nawnlo hi. Amah a kilaktoh ma-in Enok in Pasian' lungkimna ngah hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a na gen hi
Upna lo tawh kuamah in Pasian lungkimsak zolo hi. Pasian kiang a zuan mi peuhmah in Pasian a om takpi ahihna thu leh amah a zongte Pasian in thaman pia hi, ci-in a up ding kisam hi

Noah in zong a upna hang mah tawh mailama thupiang ding a muh theihlohpi mahin Pasian' thugenna na mang a, teembaw khat bawlin a innkuanpihte tawh na suakta hi. Hih bangin a gamtatna tawh leitung midangte a mawh ahihna kilangsak a, a upna hangin mihoih hihna thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah hi

Pasian in ama tungah piakdingin a ciam leitangah Abraham a pai dingin a sap lai-in Abraham in Pasian' sapna a man'na pen a upna hang mah ahi hi. A paina ding mun nangawn theilopi-in a gam leh a lei nusia-in a dingkhia hi
Pasian in piakdingin a ciam gamah a upna hang mah tawh gamdangpi hinapi-in peemta-in va om phot a, ama ngah bangin thuciamna a ngah a ta Isaac leh a tu Jakob tawh puanbuk peuhah a om phot uh hi
Pasian in geelin a lam, bulkip a nei khuapi, Abraham in a ngakna-in tua bangin a om ahi hi
Sarah a ta neihtheih ding hun beikhin napi-in ama tungah thuciampa zuaulo ding, ci-in Abraham in upna a neihna hang mahin Sarah gai-in ta a nei ahi hi
A cimang khinin a kingaihsun hih mi khat' suanlekhakte pen vana aksi zah leh tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hi

Hih mite khempeuh in amaute tungah piak dingin Pasian' ciam thute ngah nailo uh a, gamlapi-ah a omlai galmuhin hopih thei bek uh a, hih leitungah khualmi peemta hi lel hang, ci-in kitheihna tawh omin a upna mah uh tawh a si uh hi
Tua bang mite in amau-a' dingin a gam a lei ding uh a zong ahihna uh hong kilang hi
Amaute in a nusiat uh leitung ngaihsutpi penin a nei uh hi leh hong ciahkik theihna ding uh hun ngah ding uh hi

Ahi zongin amaute' lunggulh pen leitung sangin a hoihzaw vantung gam ahi hi. Pasian in amaute-a' dingin khuapi khat na vaihawmsak ahih manin, tua bang mite in amah pen ka Pasian uh hi, ci-in a gen ding uh Pasian in maizumna-in na ngaihsunlo hi

Pasian in Abraham a ze-et laitakin Abraham in a upna hang mah tawh Pasian biakna dingin a tapa Isaac na pia ngam hi. Pasian mah in Abraham tungah tapa ka hong pia ding ci-in a ciam hinapi-in, Pasian' ciamna bangin a neih tua a tapa neihsun mah, Pasian biakna dingin Abraham in pia dingin na kithawi hi
Tua a piakding tapa pen Pasian in, “Na tapa Isaac tung tawnin suanlekhak na nei ding hi,” a cihpa ahi hi
Pasian in a sisa nangawn hingkiksak thei ding hi, ci-in Abraham in a up mah bangin Abraham in a sisa a tapa Isaac a limin a ngahkik ahi hi
A tapa Jakob leh Esau in mailamah thupha ngah ding hi, ci-in Isaac in a na gen ngamna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi
Jakob a sihkuan ciangin a ciangkhut dawnah kingamin Pasian bia a, Josef' tapate gel thupha a piakna pen Pasian in na pia takpi ding hi, ci-in a upna hang mah ahi hi
Josef a sihding ciangin Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiatna ding thu leh ama luanghawm a bawlna ding zia a vaikhaknate zong a upna hang mah ahi hi
Moses a suah ciangin a nu leh a pa in hoihsa mahmahin, kumpipa' thupiakna kihta tuanloin kha thum sung a selcip ngamna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi
Moses a gol ciangin Faro' tanu' tapa kicih ding a ut nawnloh ngamna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi
Tomno sung mawhna sungah nuamtakin omding sangin Pasian' mite tawh gimna thuakkhawm ding a utzaw hi
Mailamah a thaman ding mukhol thei ahih manin Egypt gamsunga hauhna leh nopsaknate khempeuh sangin Khrih hangin simmawhna thuak taakzaw tham hi, ci-in a ngaihsun hi
Moses pen kumpipa' hehding lau hetloin Egypt gam panin paikhia a, a kimu theilo Pasian a mu bang keekin a nungkik hetlohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi
Mi That Vantungmi in Israel mite ta upa pen khempeuh a thahkhak lohna dingin Paisan Pawi kipiangsakin, inntual kongtungzawl khempeuh sisan a kizutna zong upna hang mah ahi hi
Lei keu tunga pai bang keekin Israel mite in San Tuipi a kantan theihna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi. Amaute' pai bangin Egypt mite in paiding a sawm uh ciangin tui in a tumcip hi
Israel mite in Jerikho khuapi ni sagih sung a kimvel khit uh ciangin a kulhpi a cipna zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi
Numei paktat Rahab in thukante limtakin na zindo a, Pasian' thu a manglo mite tawh a sihkhawm lohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi
Tu-a bangin gengen lai ding ihi hiam? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jefthah, David, Samuel, leh kamsangte' thu i genna ding hun omlo hi
Hih mite khempeuh in zong a upna uh hang mah tawh kumpi gam tuamtuamte zo-in, thumanin a gamtat manun Pasian' thuciam a ngah uh hi. Upna hang mah tawh humpinelkai kamte hucip uh a
meikuangpi mitsak thei-in, sihna ding panin suakta uh a, ginalo napi-in thahat uh a, gal sungah thahatin gamdang galkapte a zogawp uh hi

Numeite in a sihsuah mite uh, thawhkikna tawh a ngahna uh zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi. Mi pawlkhatte in a hoihzaw nuntakna-ah a thawhkik theihna dingun leitungah suahtak ding ut tuanloin bawlsiatna thuakin a si uh hi
Mi pawlkhat in simmawhna, satna, sikkol bulhna leh thongkiatna zong a thuak uh hi
Suang tawh a kidenglum, sing-at tawh a kiphelkham, namsau tawh a kisatlum a om hi. Tuuvun peuh, keelvun peuh silhzo bekin, cimawhin zawng uh a, gimna leh bawlsiatna a thuak uh hi
Amaute-a' dingin leitung mite kilawm zolo uh ahih manin galtai bangin gamlak leh mualtung khawngah vak kawikawi-in, leihawm suanghawm sung peuhah a om uh hi
Hih mite' upna lian mahmah hi, ci-in a kitheih hangin piakdingin Pasian in a ciamsa thute a ngah nai kei uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite-a' dingin a hoihzaw-in thu hong vaihawmsak a, amaute tawh eite i kikop ciangin amaute a cingtaak ahih theih phingna ding uh Pasian' geelna ahi hi.
